name: daily-development-tracker
description: Daily Development Tracker — Personal momentum and productivity platform

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/shared && npm run lint --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace=packages/shared && npm run lint:fix --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint:fix --workspace=apps/web
